caption: The video features a man wearing a red traditional hat and glasses, speaking to the camera. The setting appears to be an outdoor event with other individuals in the background, some of whom are engaged in conversation or using their phones. The text overlay on the screen reads "NIGERIA NEEDS ME - BOLA TINUBU," indicating that the man is likely discussing his role or potential impact on Nigeria. The logo and website address in the corner suggest that this is a news segment from PlusTV Africa, focusing on political topics. The man seems confident and composed as he addresses the audience, emphasizing his importance in the context of Nigerian politics.
